description: Configure Microsoft Edge for a construction field workstation. Set the default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/FieldData (creating the directory if it does not exist). Configure the browser to enable the Home button pointing to https://www.weather.gov and set the startup pages to https://www.osha.gov and https://www.weather.gov. Save the pages located at https://www.osha.gov/construction, https://www.osha.gov/fall-protection, and https://www.weather.gov/safety/ to /home/ga/Documents/FieldData/. Create a Favorites folder named 'Field Resources' containing bookmarks for these three pages. Document the completion of these configurations in a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/field_config_summary.txt.
